title: Savory Empanada Fritters
description: Crunchy empanada fritters filled with a delicious savory mixture of cheese and herbs. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, eggs, and seasoning.
2. Gradually add water and mix until a dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
5. Roll out each piece into a ball and flatten into a disk.
6. Place a spoonful of spherify savory cheese and feta cheese in the center of each disk.
7. Fold the dough in half to form a half-circle and press edges to seal.
8. Heat about 2-3 inches of oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
9. Fry empanada fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
10. Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
